records.english_reference:
, who had far surpassed his
father's expectations by greatly
maturing, returned to Salrath,
where his parents awaited him.
He later received an invitation
from Kalzath Castle to serve the
head of Kalzath as a knight.
Three years later, a horde of
monsters attacked Salrath, and
the town was driven to the verge
of destruction.
But Salrath made it through
safely, protected by 's
squadron, which had quickly
rushed to the scene.
His courage and gallantry were
highly esteemed, and he was thus
promoted to the famed Imperial
Guard.
records.target_korean:
크게 성장해 아버지의 기대를
훌쩍 넘어선 스코트는 부모가
기다리는 살라스로 돌아왔다. 그 후 칼자스 성의 초청을 받아
기사로서 칼자스 왕을 섬겼다. 3년 후, 살라스에 몬스터 무리가
닥쳐 마을은 멸망 직전까지 몰렸다. 그러나 급히 달려온 스코트 부대가
마을을 지켜 큰 피해는 없었다. 그 용기와 무공을 높이 평가받아
스코트는 명예로운 근위기사가 됐다.

records.english_reference:
, who had far surpassed his
father's expectations by greatly
maturing, returned to Salrath,
where his parents awaited him.
He received invitations from
several kingdoms to be their
knight captain, but ,
who still felt inexperienced,
politely declined their offers.
Three years later, a horde of
monsters attacked Salrath, but
the squadron swiftly raised by
's leadership succeeded in
repelling the enemy.
The town did not suffer any
serious damage in the attack,
and because of this,
became well known as the great
hero who had saved Salrath.
Afterwards, he came to govern
over the town and led Salrath
to prosperity.
records.target_korean:
크게 성장해 아버지의 기대를
훌쩍 넘어선 스코트는 부모가
기다리는 살라스로 돌아왔다. 여러 나라에서 기사단장으로
초청했지만, 스코트는 아직
부족하다며 정중히 거절했다. 3년 후, 몬스터 무리가 살라스를
습격했으나 스코트가 신속히
조직한 부대가 적을 물리쳤다. 마을은 큰 피해를 입지 않았고
스코트는 살라스를 구한 위대한
영웅으로 이름을 알렸다. 그 후 마을을 다스리게 된 그는 살라스를 번영으로 이끌었다.

records.english_reference:
, who had performed many
heroic deeds and had grown into
an exceptional knight, returned
safely to his hometown.
He was invited by many kingdoms
to be a knight captain, but he
elected to stay in Salrath for
the sake of his people and serve
the town with his father.
Three years later, monsters
attacked the town, but in a
spectacular display of his
leadership skills, honed in
battle, they were crushed.
His expert battle tactics were
so good that not even a single
monster was able to breach the
town's perimeter.
He was known throughout the
continent for his politeness,
as well as his superb tactics,
and he soon became a model for
aspiring knights everywhere.
records.target_korean:
수많은 공을 세워 훌륭한
기사로 성장한 스코트는
무사히 고향으로 돌아왔다. 여러 나라의 기사단장 초청을
받았지만 살라스 사람들을 위해
남아 아버지와 함께 마을을 섬겼다. 3년 후 몬스터들이 쳐들어왔으나
전쟁에서 갈고닦은 지휘력으로
적을 철저히 격파했다. 단 한 마리도 마을 안으로
들여보내지 않을 만큼
그의 전술은 완벽했다. 예의 바른 품성과 뛰어난 전술로
대륙에 이름을 떨친 스코트는 모든 기사의 본보기가 됐다.

records.english_reference:
, who had grown only
a little from these battles,
returned to Salrath, where
his parents awaited him.
Still far from being a full-
fledged knight, he soon found
himself journeying once again
at his father's behest.
When he returned to Salrath
three years later, he found
the town under attack by a
horde of monsters, remnants
from the war.
Thanks to 's actions, the
town was saved from destruction.
However, his parents were not to
be found among the survivors.
Acutely aware of his lack of
experience, he is said to have
gone off wandering in order to
better himself.
records.target_korean:
전쟁에서 조금밖에 성장하지
못한 스코트는 부모가
기다리는 살라스로 돌아왔다. 아직 한 사람의 기사로는
부족해 아버지의 명에 따라
다시 수행 여행을 떠났다. 3년 뒤 돌아온 살라스는
전쟁에서 남은 몬스터
무리의 습격을 받고 있었다. 스코트 덕분에 마을은 살았지만
생존자 중 부모의 모습은 없었다. 경험 부족을 뼈저리게 느낀
그는 자신을 단련하려 다시
방랑길에 올랐다고 한다.

records.english_reference:
, who had matured somewhat
from these battles, returned
to Salrath, where his parents
awaited him.
Unable to shake the feeling that
he was only half a man, he soon
found himself journeying once
again at his father's behest.
When he returned to Salrath
three years later, he found
the town under attack by a
horde of monsters, remnants
from the war.
Thanks to the selfless actions
of , who had grown into
a full-fledged knight by that
time, the town was safe, but
damaged.
From this battle, he became the
hero of Salrath, and finally
succeeded in fulfilling his
father's expectations of him.
records.target_korean:

스코트는 부모가 기다리는
살라스로 돌아왔다. 아직 미숙하다는 생각을 떨치지
못해 아버지의 명에 따라
다시 수행 여행을 떠났다. 3년 뒤 돌아온 살라스는
전쟁에서 남은 몬스터
무리의 습격을 받고 있었다. 훌륭한 기사로 성장한 스코트의
헌신으로 마을은 피해를
입었지만 무사히 지켜졌다. 그는 살라스의 영웅이 되어
마침내 아버지의 기대에 보답했다.

records.english_reference:
, who had gained little
from these battles, returned
to Salrath.
His parents, who had looked
forward in earnest to their
son's maturity, were not able
to hide their disappointment
with his lack of progress.
, who was nearly useless,
soon found himself journeying
once again at his father's
behest.
When he returned to Salrath
three years later, he found
the town under attack by a
horde of monsters, remnants
from the war.
fought with all of his
might, but there was no way he
could repel the invasion with
his lack of strength.
They say he was swallowed up by
the horde of monsters, never to
be seen again.
records.target_korean:

스코트는 살라스로 돌아왔다. 아들의 성장을 기대했던

실망을 감추지 못했다. 거의 쓸모없는 스코트는
아버지의 명에 따라 다시
수행 여행을 떠났다. 3년 뒤 돌아온 살라스는

무리의 습격을 받고 있었다. 스코트는 필사적으로

모습을 보이지 않았다고 한다.

records.english_reference:
, who had gained little
from these battles, returned
to Salrath.
His parents, who had looked
forward in earnest to their
son's maturity, were not able
to hide their disappointment
with his lack of progress.
, who was nearly useless,
soon found himself journeying
once again at his father's
behest.
When he returned to Salrath
three years later, he found
the town under attack by a
horde of monsters, remnants
from the war.
fought with all of his
might, but it was all he could
do just to defend himself.
They say that, after having seen
the devastation of the village
with his own eyes and feeling
ashamed of his inexperience,
he left without saying a word.
records.target_korean:

스코트는 살라스로 돌아왔다. 아들의 성장을 기대했던

실망을 감추지 못했다. 거의 쓸모없는 스코트는

records.english_reference:
, who had learned from his
battles how to effectively crush
the enemy, returned to Salrath,
where his parents awaited him.
Although he had grown strong,
his parents, who saw their son's
total disregard for his own
safety, couldn't help but feel
uneasy about his future.
Three years later, a horde
of monsters attacked the town,
which was driven to the verge
of destruction.
In that desperate, defensive
battle, fought in such
a gallant manner that he was
declared a hero.
He had saved the town, but at
the cost of his young life.
records.target_korean:
전쟁에서 적을 효율적으로 쓰러뜨리는
법을 익힌 스코트는 부모가
기다리는 살라스로 돌아왔다. 강해지긴 했지만 자기 안전을
돌보지 않는 아들의 모습에
부모는 앞날을 걱정했다. 3년 후 몬스터 무리가 쳐들어와
마을은 멸망 직전까지 몰렸다. 절망적인 방어전에서 스코트는
용맹하게 싸워 영웅으로 불렸다. 그는 마을을 구했지만 그
대가로 젊은 목숨을 잃었다.

records.english_reference:
Judging from the fact that she
said farewell to with
a glint of envy in her eyes, her
exploits on the battlefield must
not have been enough for her.
She only remained settled down
for a number of days before
quietly escaping from under
the watchful gaze of .
Presently, a hastily organized
search party is pursuing her
whereabouts; but , being
as willful as she is, is not
likely to be captured so easily.
On occasion, one will hear
rumors about a strong female
fighter, presumably .
One of these days she will
likely give up her aimless
journey and suddenly return.
records.target_korean:
여행을 떠나는 {0001}을 부러운
듯 바라보던 쉐리는 전장에서
활약이 부족했던 모양이다. 며칠간 얌전히 지내던 그녀는
키스의 눈을 피해 몰래
성을 빠져나가고 말았다. 급히 꾸린 수색대가 뒤를
쫓지만 제멋대로인 쉐리가
그리 쉽게 붙잡힐 리가 없다. 이따금 강한 여전사의 소문이 들린다.
아마 그 전사는 쉐리일 것이다. 언젠가 여행에 싫증이 난
그녀가 불쑥 돌아올지도 모른다.

records.english_reference:
Content with her success on
the battlefield, docilely
remained in Kalzath Castle for
a while.
But within only a few days, she
quietly escaped from under the
watchful gaze of and fled.
A hastily organized search party
was pursuing her whereabouts;
but , being as willful as
she was, was not likely to be
captured so easily.
A short time later, a rumor
emerged about a female fighter
who had defeated a great dragon
single-handedly, and she was
discovered by the search party.
Now is quietly residing
in the castle, but with
not knowing if she'll escape
again sometime, her guardian's
hardships do not cease.
records.target_korean:
전장에서의 활약에 만족한
쉐리는 한동안 칼자스 성에서
얌전히 지내는 듯했다. 하지만 며칠 뒤 키스의 눈을
피해 몰래 성을 빠져나갔다.
급히 꾸린 수색대가 뒤를 쫓았지만 제멋대로인 쉐리가 그리
쉽게 붙잡힐 리가 없었다. 얼마 뒤 그레이트드래곤을 혼자
쓰러뜨린 여전사의 소문이 퍼져
수색대가 그녀를 찾아냈다. 지금은 성에서 얌전히 지내지만
또 도망칠까 걱정하는 키스는
여전히 마음을 놓지 못하고 있다.

records.english_reference:
As she seemed content with her
performance on the battlefield,
everybody expected that
would start behaving herself,
but that notion quickly died.
She initially cooperated,
but several days later
unexpectedly fled the castle
in secret.
She had heard a rumor about a
demon lord invading a kingdom,
so she challenged it to a fight
in order to test her skills.
After three days and three
nights of intense fighting,
she finally defeated the demon
lord and was declared to be a
supreme warrior.
The rightful king offered his
throne to her, but she said
that no matter how much wealth
and power she obtained, it was
all meaningless to her.
Completely satisfied by earning
the prestige of a warrior, she
returned to her castle shortly
thereafter and has served her
kingdom ever since.
records.target_korean:
전장에서 크게 활약한 쉐리가
이제 철이 들 거라는 모두의
기대는 보기 좋게 빗나갔다. 처음에는 잘 따르는 듯했지만
며칠 뒤 아무 말도 없이
몰래 성을 빠져나갔다. 어느 왕국을 위협하는 마왕의
소문을 듣고 실력을 시험하려
싸움을 걸었던 것이다. 사흘 밤낮의 격전 끝에 마왕을
꺾어 최강의 용사라 불리게 됐다. 왕은 왕위를 물려주려 했지만
부와 권력은 아무 의미가
없다며 쉐리는 끝내 거절했다. 용사의 명예를 얻어 만족한
그녀는 곧 성으로 돌아와 그
뒤로 나라를 위해 힘쓰고 있다.

records.english_reference:
Having neither experienced a
single defeat nor accomplished
any great victories in the war,
she secretly fled the castle
within only a few days.
In 's room was found a
letter; it said that she went
to train in order to become
stronger.
Presently, a hastily organized
search party is pursuing her
whereabouts; but , being
as willful as she is, is not
likely to be captured so easily.
Since then, no rumors or other
information about her have been
forthcoming. All we can do now
is pray that she will return
safely.
records.target_korean:
이번 전쟁에서 한 번 패했을
뿐 큰 활약도 하지 못한 쉐리는
며칠 뒤 몰래 성을 빠져나갔다. 쉐리의 방에는 더 강해지기
위해 수행을 떠난다는
쪽지만 남아 있었다. 급히 꾸린 수색대가 뒤를
쫓지만 제멋대로인 쉐리가
그리 쉽게 붙잡힐 리가 없다. 그 뒤로는 그녀의 소문이
아무것도 들려오지 않는다. 지금은 그저 무사히
돌아오기를 바랄 수밖에 없다.

records.english_reference:
, greatly distraught over

records.english_reference:
Unable to forget her single loss
in battle, despite many great
exploits, she fled the castle
in pursuit of within
days of parting with him.
In 's room was found a
letter; it said that she went
to train in order to become
stronger. A search party was
hastily formed to pursue her.
A short time later, a rumor
emerged about a female fighter
who had defeated a great dragon
single-handedly, and she was
discovered by the search party.
Since her wounds have not yet
healed, is being well
behaved for the moment, but
will probably escape from the
castle again soon enough.

찾듯 사람들을 괴롭히던 사악한
드래곤에게 싸움을 걸었다. 처절하고 용맹한 격전 끝에
사악한 드래곤은 마침내 쓰러졌다. 그러나 죽어 가던 드래곤의
숨결이 아론을 덮쳐 그도
순식간에 잿더미가 되고 말았다. 아론은 처음부터 죽을 생각으로
싸움을 걸었다는 이도 있었다.

records.english_reference:
Having returned to town,
resumed his life of retirement.
He opened a fencing school for
children, whom he was especially
fond of.
He wanted not only to teach the
art of swordsmanship and build
up minds and bodies, but also
to cultivate sound hearts in
children.
However, as he had not shown any
great valor in the past, there
were no parents who would send
their children to him.
Without even a single student,
he quickly fell into the depths
of poverty.
Suffering from loneliness, it
is said that he died quietly
and alone.
records.target_korean:
마을로 돌아온 아론은 전과
다름없이 은거 생활을 시작했다. 아이들을 좋아한 그는 도장을
열어 검술을 가르치기 시작했다. 검술과 체력만이 아니라 바른 마음까지
지닌 아이들을 길러 내고 싶었다. 하지만 지난 전쟁에서 큰 공을 세우지 못해
아이를 맡기려는 부모는 아무도 없었다. 제자를 단 한 명도 얻지 못한
그는 곧 가난과 외로움에 시달리다
홀로 조용히 숨을 거뒀다고 한다.

records.english_reference:
Having returned to town,
resumed his life of retirement.
, who still felt like he
could never lose to youth,
opened a fencing school for
children, whom he adored.
There he not only taught the art
of swordsmanship and built up
minds and bodies, he tried to
cultivate sound hearts as well.
His training school was a
success, and he gathered
many disciples.
But with his wounds reopened, he
fell down one day, and with many
students looking on, silently
passed away.
However, it is said that being
able to die while surrounded
by children, rather than on
the battlefield, made him
truly happy.

위해 검술 도장을 열었다. 검술과 체력만이 아니라 바른 마음까지

도져 어느 날 많은 제자가 보는
앞에서 말없이 숨을 거뒀다. 전장이 아닌 아이들에게 둘러싸여 죽어
아론은 진심으로 기뻐했을 것이라고 한다.

records.english_reference:
As had already become
an adult, began to search
for a different way of life, out
of righteousness.
His actions on the battlefield
not being enough to satisfy him,
together with his underlings he
returned to piracy and a life on
the sea.
However, he was perturbed about
the existence of a huge pirate
group that had laid waste to his
area in the meantime.
The great battle between these
two pirate groups lasted many
days, and 's army, which
was at a numerical disadvantage,
was in serious trouble.
But , who had an abundance
of real battlefield experience,
pulled off a stunning surprise
attack at the end and achieved
a great victory.
He came to be known as the
Pirate King.
records.target_korean:
제시카가 성장해 은혜를 다 갚았다고
여긴 레스터는 새 삶을 찾기 시작했다. 이번 전쟁의 활약으로는 성에 차지
않아 부하들과 해적으로 돌아가
다시 바다에서 살기로 했다. 하지만 그의 영역을 휩쓰는 거대
해적단이 레스터의 신경을 거슬렀다. 두 해적단의 전쟁은 며칠이나
이어졌고 수가 적은 레스터군은
큰 위기에 빠졌다. 하지만 실전에 익숙한 레스터는 마지막에
멋진 기습을 성공시켜 대승을 거뒀다. 그 뒤 레스터는
해적왕이라 불리게 됐다.

records.english_reference:
As had already become
an adult, began to search
for a different way of life, out
of righteousness.
Having been satisfied with his
many exploits during the war,
he put up his sword and chose
to live a respectable life.
Several years passed, and he
began to fondly remember the
sea. He heard a story about
giant sea monsters that had
laid waste to a nearby port.
, feeling his blood boil,
challenged the monsters alone,
and at the end of the heroic
battle, he had vanquished them.
The people of the port gave him
an enormous reward. Using that
money to buy a ship, they say
he sailed the seas in search of
adventure.
records.target_korean:

검을 놓고 성실하게 살기로 했다. 몇 년이 지나자 바다가 그리워질
무렵 근처 항구를 휩쓰는
거대한 해수의 소문을 들었다. 피가 끓어오른 레스터는 홀로 도전해
격렬한 싸움 끝에 해수를 쓰러뜨렸다. 항구 사람들이 준 거액의
상금으로 배를 산 그는 모험을
찾아 바다로 떠났다고 한다.

Several years passed, and he

But then he heard about a large
pirate group that was ravaging
the nearby waters.
, feeling his blood boil,
entered the pirate's hideout
alone, and, after a reckless
battle, repelled them.
His reputation became known
across the continent and his
honor was praised. It came
to be that a statue of him
was enshrined in every port.

만큼 그 공적은 칭송받았다.

for a different way of life, out

not being enough to satisfy him,
together with his underlings he
returned to piracy and a life on
the sea.
But because he was unable to
regain his fervor, and since his
funds had dried up, he began to
raid nearby ports and ships.
After the bad reputation among
sailors of the pirates led by
came to be known, a
single man similar to
appeared.
, after being confronted
by the stranger, was finally
cut down by the man's sword.
As for the rest of the pirates,
it is said that they would
quarrel over how to divide
the treasure they looted
and eventually died out.

항구와 배를 습격하기 시작했다. 악명이 퍼질 무렵 그와 닮은 남자가
나타나 레스터는 그 남자의 검에 쓰러졌다. 남은 부하들도 빼앗은 보물을 놓고
다투다가 서로 죽었다고 한다.

records.english_reference:
Having lost his self-confidence
during the fighting, he returned
meekly to . After a time,
he disappeared into town, hoping
to live a respectable life.
However, having become weak,
the interactions of society
were difficult for him, and
he became lonely.
He somehow managed for a time,
but soon returned to .
was amazed at this,
but could not reject him, as
one might expect. Like long
ago, she put him to work as
a guard at Rahl River.
As for , he believed
himself to be 's
bodyguard, but in actuality,
the reverse was true.
records.target_korean:
전쟁에서 자신감을 잃은 레스터는
풀이 죽어 제시카에게 돌아왔다. 그 뒤 성실하게 살려고 어느 날
마을로 사라졌지만 약해진 그에게
세상살이는 차갑고 외로웠다. 한동안은 어떻게든 버텼지만 얼마
못 가 제시카에게 돌아왔다. 제시카는 놀랐지만 그를 내치지 못하고
예전처럼 랄강의 경비를 맡겼다. 레스터는 자기가 제시카의 호위라고
생각했지만 실제로는 그 반대였다. 그것이 두 사람의 관계였다고 한다.

records.english_reference:
Despite valorous conduct that
helped lead to victory in the
war, he felt like a failure
and became dejected.
Having no plans to enter the
blood-stained battlefield again,
he did a short stint as a pirate
before acting as 's
bodyguard once more.
The doldrums of boredom would
continue until one day some
surviving monsters amassed
into a coordinated group and
advanced on Rahl River.
He fought to protect
and succeeded in repelling the
attack, but was badly hurt and
his body disappeared beneath the
flowing waters of Rahl River.
records.target_korean:
이번 전쟁에서 적에게 큰 타격을 줘
승리를 이끌었지만 생각보다 많은 패배에
레스터는 풀 수 없는 분노를 느꼈다. 다시 해적이 되어 피비린내
나는 전장에 설 생각은 없어
제시카의 호위를 한동안 계속했다. 지루한 나날이 이어지던 어느
날 몬스터 잔당이 무리를
지어 랄강으로 쳐들어왔다. 제시카를 지키려 홀로 분투해 적을
물리쳤지만 중상을 입은 레스터는
랄강의 물결 속으로 사라졌다.

records.english_reference:
With the fighting over, he left
his home village and moved into
's laboratory to be her
apprentice, in order to conduct
magical research.
Since he was unable to perform
any great feats in battle, he
primarily studied practical
magic, rather than theory.
As he learned greater and
greater magic, he steadily
grew stronger.
Eventually his talents awoke,
and he became able to handle
things like the discovery of
long-lost ancient magic and even
the development of new spells.
He later left on a journey in
order to help people with his
magic. It is said that he saved
countless lives and was welcomed
by everyone wherever he went.
records.target_korean:
전쟁이 끝나자 헤인은 고향을
떠나 제시카의 제자가 되어 그녀의
연구소에서 마법을 연구하기 시작했다. 전장에서 큰 활약을 못 한 그는
화려함보다 실용적인 마법을 주로
연구하며 꾸준히 힘을 길렀다. 마침내 재능이 깨어나 고대 마법을 찾고
새로운 마법까지 개발할 수 있게 됐다. 그 뒤 마법으로 사람들을
돕고자 여행을 떠났다. 수많은 목숨을 구한 헤인은 가는
곳마다 환영받았다고 한다.

records.english_reference:
Leaving the village he had grown
up in, he worked hard on magical
research at 's laboratory
as her apprentice.
There, he not only discovered
powerful, ancient magic, but he
also developed new spells, and
so a great deal of new magic
came into being.
Half of it required the kind of
power that only a small group of
people could control, but thanks
to him the art of magic had been
significantly advanced.
A great revolution in magic was
born, and the teachings of
became the basis for magic on
the continent.
And thus acquired the title
of Great Wizard at a young age.
records.target_korean:
헤인은 고향을 떠나 제시카의 제자가 되어
그녀의 연구소에서 마법 연구에 힘썼다. 강력한 고대 마법을 발견하고 새
마법도 개발해 수많은 마법이 탄생했다. 그중 절반은 일부 천재만
다룰 수 있었지만 헤인 덕분에
마법 기술은 크게 발전했다. 마법의 대혁명이 일어나 헤인의
가르침은 대륙 마법의 기초가 됐다. 그렇게 헤인은 젊은 나이에
대마법사라 불리게 됐다.

to him the art of magic had been
significantly advanced.
Countless wizards flocked to
him, and before long a wizard
guild on a continental scale
had been formed.
Through the energetic actions
of this guild, magic became
even more refined and advanced.
And so, became known as
the finest Great Wizard in all
of history.
records.target_korean:
헤인은 고향을 떠나 제시카의 제자가 되어
그녀의 연구소에서 마법 연구에 힘썼다. 강력한 고대 마법을 발견하고 새
마법도 개발해 수많은 마법이 탄생했다. 그중 절반은 일부 천재만
다룰 수 있었지만 헤인 덕분에
마법 기술은 크게 발전했다. 수많은 마법사가 헤인에게
모여들어 마침내 대륙 규모의
마술사 길드가 탄생했다. 길드의 활발한 활동으로 마법은
더욱 정교하고 강력하게 발전했다. 헤인은 역사상 최고의 대마법사로
후세에 이름을 남겼다.

records.english_reference:
With the fighting over, he left
his home village and moved into
's laboratory to be her
apprentice, in order to conduct
magical research.
Since he was unable to perform
any great feats in battle, he
primarily studied practical
magic, rather than theory.
At one point he tried to study
even higher-level practical
magic, but it seemed to elude
his powers of comprehension.
Eventually he started dabbling
in the research of new magic,
but all he produced was useless,
childish spells.
Perhaps this was because he did
not understand the fundamental
nature of magic very well.
Seemingly content with his
abilities, it is said that
he continued developing
weird spells.
records.target_korean:
전쟁이 끝나자 헤인은 고향을
떠나 제시카의 제자가 되어 그녀의
연구소에서 마법을 연구하기 시작했다. 전장에서 큰 활약을 못 한 그는
화려함보다 실용적인 마법을 주로 연구했다. 더 높은 수준의 실용 마법에 도전했지만
그의 이해력으로는 역부족이었다. 새 마법 연구에도 손을
댔지만 쓸모없는 어린애 장난
같은 마법만 만들어 냈다. 마법의 본질을 제대로
이해하지 못한 탓일 것이다. 그래도 자기 능력에 만족한 헤인은
기묘한 마법을 계속 개발했다고 한다.

records.english_reference:
With the fighting over, he left
his home village and moved into
's laboratory to be her
apprentice, in order to conduct
magical research.
, who had recognized his own
inexperience, studied various
kinds of magic under .
At one point he thought up
a simple method of fortune-
telling using magic.
He would then do things like
predict the following day's
weather or look up healing
remedies for people who were
sick.
Because his success rate was
high, he was revered by the
people in his area.
Eventually he used this skill to
find an ancient royal treasure.
He became very rich, and lived
an extravagant life.
records.target_korean:

연구소에서 마법을 연구하기 시작했다. 미숙함을 깨달은 헤인은 제시카
밑에서 여러 마법을 배웠다. 그러다 마법을 이용한 간단한
점술 방법을 생각해 냈다. 다음날 날씨를 맞히거나 환자에게
맞는 치료법을 점쳐 주곤했다. 적중률이 높아 근처
사람들의 큰 존경을 받았다. 마침내 그 힘으로 고대 왕국의 보물을
찾아 큰 부자가 되어 호화롭게 살았다.

records.english_reference:
Leaving the village he had grown
up in, he worked hard on magical
research at 's laboratory
as her apprentice.
, who had recognized his own
inexperience, studied various
kinds of magic under .
On the side, he started to work
on the rediscovery of ancient
magic, and eventually he was
rewarded.
He found a powerful spell to
control the climate at will,
and became able to prevent crop
failures caused by things like
droughts.
News spread, and he was summoned
by the kings and aristocrats to
manipulate the weather in each
kingdom.
It is said that, thanks to him,
the entire continent became
prosperous and countless people
were able to live in happiness.
records.target_korean:
헤인은 고향을 떠나 제시카의 제자가 되어
그녀의 연구소에서 마법 연구에 힘썼다. 미숙함을 깨달은 헤인은 제시카
밑에서 여러 마법을 배웠다. 한편으로 고대 마법을 다시 찾는 연구에도
손을 댔고 마침내 성과를 거뒀다. 날씨를 마음대로 다루는 강력한 마법으로
가뭄 같은 흉작을 막을 수 있게 됐다. 소문을 들은 각국의 왕과 귀족들은
날씨를 바꾸려고 헤인을 불렀다. 그 덕분에 대륙 전체가 풍요로워져
수많은 사람이 행복하게 살았다고 한다.

records.english_reference:
had confidence in his own
magic, but because of his poor
performance during the war,
he eventually admitted his own
powerlessness.
To him who dreamed of becoming
a first-class wizard, the shock
was unbearable.
He regained his determination
and began to consider starting
his magical education over from
birth.
So he studied the reincarnation
magic that could use
naturally, and bet everything
on his next life.
But, being incompetent, that
sort of high-level magic was
beyond his ken, so nobody has
heard of his reappearance yet.
records.target_korean:
마법에 자신이 있던 헤인은
전쟁에서 처참한 결과를 내자
자신의 무력함을 깨닫고 말았다. 일류 마법사를 꿈꾸던 그에게 그
충격은 견딜 수 없는 것이었다. 각오를 다진 헤인은 아예 태어날
때부터 마법을 다시 배울 생각을 했다. 제시카가 쓰는 환생 마법을 익혀
다음 생에 모든 것을 걸었다. 하지만 그런 고등 마법은
헤인에게 무리였는지 환생했다는
소식은 아직도 들리지 않는다.

records.english_reference:
had confidence in his own
magic, but because of his poor
performance during the war,
he eventually realized his
lack of experience.
So became an apprentice
of and studied various
kinds of magic under her.
Eventually, he too started to
acquire some power and became
able to control intermediate-
level magic, which gave him
confidence.
Because of this, he wanted to
try a spell that had
told him to stay away from,
and so, in secret, he tried
casting the magic.
It was a forbidden spell that
summoned a mighty demon. ,
who had failed to control the
monster, was dragged into the
netherworld.
records.target_korean:
마법에 자신이 있던 헤인은
전쟁에서 큰 성과를 내지 못해
자신의 미숙함을 깨닫고 말았다. 제시카의 제자가 되어
그녀에게 여러 마법을 배웠다. 마침내 중급 마법을 다룰 힘을
얻자 헤인은 자신감을 되찾았다. 그는 제시카가 금지한 마법을 써
보고 싶어 몰래 주문을 외웠다. 강력한 데몬을 부르는 금단의
주문이었다. 마물을 제어하지 못한
헤인은 마계로 끌려가고 말았다.

records.english_reference:
Leaving the village he had grown
up in, he worked hard on magical
research at 's laboratory
as her apprentice.
Having completely forgotten
the defeats he suffered in the
war, would only remember
his great accomplishments.
Because of that, he developed
delusions of grandeur and wound
up with an arrogant and selfish
personality.
He eventually found a powerful
spell to control the climate at
will, and became able to prevent
crop failures caused by things
like droughts.
He offered to manipulate the
weather of each area, but his
asking price was extremely
steep, which caused a great
deal of animosity.
One day he lost his life to the
sword of a person who had been
driven temporarily insane out
of anger at the outrageous sums
demanded.
records.target_korean:
헤인은 고향을 떠나 제시카의 제자가 되어
그녀의 연구소에서 마법 연구에 힘썼다. 패배는 모두 잊고 활약만 기억한
헤인은 자기 재능에 취해 버렸다. 그 결과 과대망상에 빠져
오만하고 이기적인 성격이 됐다. 마침내 날씨를 마음대로 다루는
강력한 마법을 발견해 가뭄 같은
흉작을 막을 수 있게 됐다. 각 지역의 날씨를 바꿔 주겠다며
나섰지만 요구하는 돈이 너무
비싸 사람들의 큰 반감을 샀다. 터무니없는 값에 분노해
제정신을 잃은 사람의 칼에 맞아
헤인은 목숨을 잃고 말았다.

records.english_reference:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
Returning once again to her
laboratory near Rahl River,
she resumed the study of
magic, which was her hobby.
However, wizards who had heard
rumors about began to
flock to her, and they became
her apprentices.
Before long, the apprentices
began to teach 's magic
in each of their own lands, and
her name was known throughout
the continent.
She then wrote a book which
compiled all her knowledge thus
far. It became very influential
and was regarded as a handbook
for wizards.
records.target_korean:
랑그릿사를 둘러싼 오랜 싸움이
끝나 제시카는 빛의 후예를
이끌 숙명에서 마침내 해방됐다. 랄강가의 연구소로 돌아온 그녀는
취미였던 마법 연구를 다시 시작했다. 소문을 들은 마법사들이
모여들어 제시카의 제자가 됐다. 얼마 뒤 제자들은 각지에서 그녀의 마법을
가르쳤고 이름은 대륙에 널리 퍼졌다. 제시카가 모든 지식을 정리한
마도서는 큰 영향을 끼쳐
마법사들의 필독서가 됐다.

records.english_reference:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
She rebuilt her laboratory near
Rahl River to allow even more
wizards to do research, and
also opened a school of magic.
Even though it was in a remote
region, in the blink of an eye
countless wizards came to visit.
The lectures given by ,
who possessed a great deal of
long-forgotten knowledge, were
considered priceless by the
magicians.
Over time, wizards throughout
the continent wanted to take
's classes, and she was
unable to handle the volume of
students in her tiny laboratory.
Eventually the school grew to
become the first university of
magic in history.
records.target_korean:
랑그릿사를 둘러싼 오랜 싸움이

랄강가의 연구소를 고치고
마법 학교도 열었다. 외진 곳인데도 수많은
마법사가 순식간에 몰려들었다. 잊힌 지식을 많이 지닌 제시카의 강의는
마법사들에게 값으로 매길 수 없었다. 대륙의 마법사들이 모두
수업을 원해 작은 연구소로는
제자를 감당할 수 없게 됐다. 마침내 학교는 역사상 최초의
마법 대학으로 발전했다.

records.english_reference:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
Unable to forget her single
defeat, returned once
more to her laboratory near Rahl
River to acquire more knowledge.
Along with , who had become
her apprentice, she then wrote a
book which compiled the results
of her research.
However, the extremely difficult
contents were too much for most
wizards to comprehend, and only
a few of them took much pleasure
in reading it.
Nowadays she is working on a
revision of the book that is
easier to understand.
records.target_korean:
랑그릿사를 둘러싼 오랜 싸움이

on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.

River to acquire more knowledge.

The easy-to-comprehend writing

They say that now has

records.target_korean:

끝나 제시카는 빛의 후예를

records.english_reference:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
Unable to forget her single
defeat, returned once
more to her laboratory near Rahl
River to acquire more knowledge.
She then wrote a book which
compiled the results of her
research, which soon became
the standard for magicians
everywhere.
As a result, 's name
spread throughout the land,
and those who wish to study
under her directly arrive
constantly, even now.
Although small, her rebuilt
laboratory is known today as
the Rahl River School of Magic.
records.target_korean:
랑그릿사를 둘러싼 오랜 싸움이
끝나 제시카는 빛의 후예를
이끌 숙명에서 마침내 해방됐다. 단 한 번의 패배를 잊지 못한

records.english_reference:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
Deeply regretting the fact that
she was not very useful during
the war, returned to
her laboratory near Rahl River.
, who had convinced
herself that she was basically
powerless, worked diligently on
her magic research in order to
improve herself.
After , who had come for
magic training, disappeared,
hardly anyone came to visit
her anymore.
As truth fades away into legend,
so too has her name faded from
the memory of history.
records.target_korean:
랑그릿사를 둘러싼 오랜 싸움이
끝나 제시카는 빛의 후예를
이끌 숙명에서 마침내 해방됐다. 전쟁에서 별 도움이 되지 못한 것을
뉘우치며 랄강가의 연구소로 돌아왔다. 무력함을 느낀 제시카는 자신을
단련하려 마법 연구에 온 힘을 쏟았다. 마법을 배우러 온 헤인이 사라진 뒤
그녀를 찾는 사람도 거의 없어졌다. 사실 이 전설 속으로 사라지듯
제시카의 이름도 역사의
기억에서 사라지고 말았다.

records.english_reference:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
However, having experienced one
defeat after another, futility
was all that remained in her
heart.
Believing that magic only causes
suffering, , who had
embraced doubt, resumed her
research in a new direction
after returning to Rahl River.
Despite long, arduous research,
she felt that no answer would
ever be forthcoming, so she
temporarily departed from this
world with reincarnation magic.
They say that the only thing
that remained in her laboratory
was the book in which she had
detailed all her research up
to the very end.
records.target_korean:
랑그릿사를 둘러싼 오랜 싸움이
끝나 제시카는 빛의 후예를
이끌 숙명에서 마침내 해방됐다. 하지만 거듭된 패배로
마음에는 허무함만 남았다. 마법은 사람을 상처 입힐 뿐인지
의심한 제시카는 랄강으로 돌아와
새로운 방향의 연구를 시작했다. 오랜 연구에도 답을 찾지 못하자 환생
마법으로 잠시 이 세상을 떠났다. 연구소에는 마지막까지의 성과를
상세히 적은 마도서만 남았다고 한다.

records.english_reference:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
had experienced numerous
crises, but in her own way she
ended up proving the greatness
of magic.
Believing that magic shouldn't
be used just to hurt others, she
resumed her research in a new
direction after returning to her
Rahl River laboratory.
Despite long, arduous research,
she felt that no answer would
ever be forthcoming, but without
realizing it she had done quite
a lot of magic research.
After condensing it all into
a magic book, she vacated the
laboratory and left on a quest
for knowledge to train her mind.
records.target_korean:
랑그릿사를 둘러싼 오랜 싸움이
끝나 제시카는 빛의 후예를
이끌 숙명에서 마침내 해방됐다. 수많은 위기를 겪었지만 제시카는 자기
방식으로 마법의 위대함을 증명했다. 마법은 남을 해치기 위한
것이 아니라며 랄강 연구소에서
새 방향의 연구를 시작했다. 긴 연구에도 답은 없었지만 어느새
상당한 마법 성과가 쌓여 있었다. 그 성과를 마도서로 정리한 제시카는
연구소를 비우고 마음을 닦으며
지식을 찾는 여행을 떠났다.

records.english_reference:
, the Prince of Darkness,
had tried countless times to
ensnare the world in a ruinous
cataclysm.
With the manipulation of Emperor
, his plans appeared to
be succeeding but were stopped
just before completion.
Ironically, his loss had
not been at the hands of the
Descendants of Light but rather
and the evil sword
Alhazard.
The flesh and soul of his
immortal body became the power
of Darkness and were absorbed
by Alhazard, which was then
vanquished from this world.
With his death the threat of
Darkness lifted, but as long as
this conflict is remembered in
legend, , the Prince of
Darkness, will live on.
records.target_korean:
어둠의 왕자 보젤은 수없이 세상을
파멸의 위기에 빠뜨리려 했다. 베른하르트 황제를 조종해 계획은 성공
직전까지 갔지만 막판에 저지됐다. 아이러니하게 그를 쓰러뜨린
것은 빛의 후예가 아니라
베른하르트와 마검 알하자드였다. 불사의 몸과 영혼은 어둠의
힘이 되어 알하자드에 흡수된
뒤 이 세상에서 사라졌다. 그의 죽음으로 어둠의 위협은
걷혔지만 전설이 남는 한 어둠의 왕자
보젤의 공포도 계속 전해질 것이다.

records.english_reference:
The brave General , head
of the Fire Dragon Army, had
stood in the way of
and the others countless times.
He was a big threat due to his
expert tactics refined through
actual battlefield experience.
His last conflict was the land
battle within the town of Lunam.
It was the clash with
in which used the Flame
Dragons to buy time to
abscond with .
Leaving Eliza, who was near
childbirth, rushed into
the battlefield when the Flame
Dragon Army was exposed to
danger.
To rescue his men,
disregarded his own safety and
threw himself into the frenzy of
battle. His life was cut short
at the hand of .
In the present age, in which the
conflict over the two swords has
long ended, his name is only
remembered by history.
records.target_korean:
염룡병단을 이끈 맹장 발가스는
실전에서 다듬은 전술로 {0001} 일행을
수없이 가로막은 강적이었다. 그의 마지막 전장은 루나무에서
벌어진 시가전이었다. 에그베르트가 리아나를 납치할
시간을 벌려고 염룡병단은 {0001} 일행과
루나무에서 싸움을 이어 갔다. 출산을 앞둔 엘리자를 남겨 둔 발가스는
부대가 위기에 빠지자 전장으로 달려갔다. 부하들을 구하려 몸을 돌보지
않고 난전 속에 뛰어들었지만
{0000}의 손에 목숨을 잃었다. 두 검의 싸움이 먼 옛일이 된 지금
그의 이름만 역사에 남아 있다.

records.english_reference:
, general of the Empire's
Ice Dragon Navy, had feigned
having a personality that was
the exact opposite of .
Her cool-headed and cruel
disposition, which did not match
her gorgeous appearance, greatly
magnified the fear of her within
the Imperial armies.
However, while setting sail to
return to Emperor 's
castle, she was attacked by
and the others.
As the fighting had begun much
earlier than she anticipated,
her reinforcements did not make
it in time, and her life came to
an end by 's blow.
With her death, the morale of
the surviving members of the
Ice Dragon Navy vanished, and
the unit collapsed.
records.target_korean:
제국 수룡병단의 여장군
이멜다는 발가스와 정반대의
성격을 가진 듯 행동했다. 화려한 외모와 달리 냉정하고 잔혹해
제국군조차 그녀를 두려워했다. 베른하르트 황제의 성으로 돌아가려고
출항했지만 {0001} 일행의 습격을 받았다. 예상보다 이른 전투에 원군이
오지 못했고 이멜다는 {0000}의
일격에 쓰러졌다. 그녀가 죽자 남은 수룡병단은
사기를 잃고 그대로 무너졌다.

records.english_reference:
's life changed forever
after meeting , who
possessed immense strength and
the charisma to charm people.
They both dreamed of a peaceful,
unified continent, and so he bet
everything on the man who would
be Emperor.
Although young, , who had
both ingenuity and unusual skill
with the sword, was appointed
the commander of the glorious
Blue Dragon Knights.
He was popular among his troops
for his good character, and his
deeds of valor and undefeated
combat record won him the trust
of the Emperor.
However, the Empire, its plans
crushed by the resistance of
's group, began to fall
into decline.
In a battle to the death with
, was unable to
defeat him and his comrades
of surpassing skill.
Then, knowing that it was the
end for the Empire, he chose the
same fate as the Emperor he had
believed in.
records.target_korean:
강한 힘과 사람을 사로잡는
카리스마를 지닌 베른하르트와의
만남은 레온의 삶을 바꿨다. 대륙 통일과 평화라는 같은
꿈을 위해 레온은 황제가 될
남자에게 모든 것을 걸었다. 젊지만 지략과 뛰어난 검술을 갖춘
그는 청룡기사단의 지휘관으로 임명됐다. 훌륭한 인품으로 부하의 신망을
얻고 수많은 무공과 무패
기록으로 황제의 신뢰를 받았다. 하지만 {0001} 일행의 저항에 계획이
무너지며 제국은 쇠퇴하기 시작했다. {0001}과의 결전에서 {0001}의 동료들을
이기지 못한 레온은 제국의 끝을 깨닫고
믿었던 황제와 같은 운명을 택했다.

records.english_reference:
The Great Wizard . He led
the Black Dragon Sorcerers, and
secretly supported the Rayguard
Empire while pretending to serve
.
's real strength was his
immense magical power, said to
be the best on the continent,
and his trenchant insights;
he excelled even in politics.
As staff officer of the Emperor,
he had complete control. This
too was a task well suited to
his abundant knowledge and
cleverness.
The one who had seen through
's machinations and who had
laid out a brilliant stratagem
was none other than .
He obtained the evil sword
Alhazard and succeeded in
bestowing upon
its unlimited power.
However, he was opposed by the
many allies of , who had
acquired Langrisser.
When they fell into his trap,
showered upon them the
concentrated magic attacks of
the Black Dragon Sorcerers.
But due to a single attack by
, who found a momentary
opening, he died a heroic death.
records.target_korean:
대마법사 에그베르트는
흑룡마도사단을 이끌며 그림자
속에서 레이갈드 제국을 떠받쳤다. 대륙 최고라 불린 막대한
마력과 날카로운 통찰이 진정한
힘이었고 정치에도 뛰어났다. 황제의 참모로서 전권을 쥔
것도 풍부한 지식과 지혜를 지닌
그에게 어울리는 역할이었다. 보젤의 계략을 간파해 멋진
작전을 세운 이도 에그베르트였다. 마검 알하자드를 손에 넣어 그 무한한
힘을 베른하르트에게 주는 일에 성공했다. 하지만 랑그릿사를 얻은 {0001}과
{0001}의 동료들이 그 앞을 가로막았다. 함정에 빠진 그들에게 흑룡마도사단의
집중 마법 공격을 퍼부었다. 그러나 한순간의 틈을 찾은
{0000}의 일격을 받고 장렬히 죽었다.

records.english_reference:
Emperor , ruler of the
Grand Empire Rayguard, in but a
single generation revived the
kingdom and thereafter conquered
the majority of the continent.
His charisma brought him not
only his four generals but also
a great many superbly-skilled
subordinates. Their performance
always met his expectations.
Having acquired Alhazard by
defeating , the Prince of
Darkness who tried to manipulate
him, then became the
strongest man in the continent.
]Men's hearts are weak, and
those who don't believe in
anyone will hurt others."
Because he recognized human
weaknesses, sought
unification through military
might. But some might consider
that to be a ]reign of terror".
To acquire the strength in which
he could be supreme in any kind
of conflict, the war escalated
and a great deal of innocent
blood was spilt.
But with Langrisser in the
possession of the Descendants of
Light, who joined their hearts
into one, his dream collapsed...
had found himself
in a decisive battle against
within the underground
temple in the innermost depths
of Velzeria Castle.
He suffered heavy, fatal wounds.
When he realized that it was
over for him, with his own hand
the once-mighty Emperor caused
Alhazard to go out of control.
It was as if he had made the
distinction between right and
wrong of the war he started
himself.
Finally, he put an end to his
life, which had been full of
troublesome ups and downs.
records.target_korean:
레이갈드 대제국의 황제 베른하르트는
한 세대 만에 나라를 되살린 뒤
대륙의 절반 이상을 손에 넣었다. 네 장군뿐 아니라 수많은 유능한
부하가 그의 카리스마에 모여들었고
항상 기대에 맞는 활약을 보였다. 자신을 조종하려던 어둠의 왕자
보젤을 쓰러뜨리고 알하자드를 얻은
그는 대륙 최강의 남자가 됐다. 사람의 마음은 약하다. 아무도 믿지
못해 서로에게 상처를 주는 그 약함을
알기에 무력으로 통일하려 했다. 하지만 보는 이에 따라 그것은
공포 정치였을지도 모른다. 어떤 싸움에도 군림할 힘을 얻으려 전쟁은
격해졌고 무고한 피가 끝없이 흘렀다. 마음을 하나로 모은 빛의 후예가
랑그릿사를 얻자 그의 꿈은 무너졌다. 벨제리아 성 가장 깊은 지하
신전에서 베른하르트는 {0001}과
마지막 결전을 벌였다. 치명적인 깊은 상처를 입은
그는 자신의 끝을 깨달았다. 한때 대륙을 호령한 황제는 자기
손으로 알하자드를 폭주시켰다. 자신이 일으킨 전쟁의 옳고
그름을 가리려는 듯 파란만장한
삶을 스스로 끝냈다.

records.english_reference:
Returning to her home village,
started an orphanage for
those who had lost their parents
during the war.
This orphanage, which she had
started as a charity enterprise,
fell into financial trouble, and
operating it became difficult.
But the prince of a neighboring
kingdom, who had fallen in love
with 's beauty, started
financing it.
Because of this, the war orphans
grew up in good health and began
a movement to prevent children
from suffering the same fate as
them.
It is said that finally
accepted the many passionate
proposals of the prince. They
married and lived in happiness.
records.target_korean:
고향으로 돌아온 리아나는
전쟁으로 부모를 잃은 아이들을
위해 고아원을 세웠다. 자선으로 시작한 고아원은 자금난에
빠져 운영하기 어려워졌다. 리아나의 아름다움에 반한 이웃 나라
왕자가 고아원을 돕기 시작했다. 그 덕분에 고아들은 건강하게
자라 같은 처지의 아이를
없애려는 운동을 시작했다. 리아나는 왕자의 여러 차례에 걸친
진심 어린 청혼을 마침내 받아들였다. 두 사람은 결혼해
행복하게 살았다고 한다.

records.english_reference:
Returning to her home village,
started an orphanage for
those who had lost their parents
during the war.
Together with , who
had returned to her, she
later went to each area
of the continent to build
a peaceful world.
Before long, the many people who
relied on her character came to
finance her, and the orphanage
turned into a learning center.
Time passed, and the orphans,
who had grown up well, also came
to help her. Eventually her wish
was fulfilled; she had succeeded
in ending war on the continent.
They were revered as the ones
who finally brought peace.
records.target_korean:
고향으로 돌아온 리아나는
전쟁으로 부모를 잃은 아이들을
위해 고아원을 세웠다. 돌아온 {0001}과 함께 평화로운 세상을
만들려고 대륙 각지를 돌아다녔다. 리아나의 인품을 믿은 수많은 사람이
후원해 고아원은 교육 기관으로 발전했다. 성장한 고아들도 힘을 보태 리아나의
꿈은 이뤄졌고 대륙의 전쟁은 끝났다. 두 사람은 마침내 평화를 가져온
이로 존경받았다고 한다.

records.english_reference:
Returning to her home village,
started an orphanage for
those who had lost their parents
during the war.
However, there was no one at
that time who would finance
such an unprofitable enterprise.
One day, a messenger from the
castle of a neighboring kingdom
approached , who was lost
in thought at the moment.
A king who had heard rumors of
her beauty wanted her to marry
his son. He said that if she
accepted, he would finance the
orphanage.
She seemed to be quite troubled,
but having no other options, she
had no choice but to accept.
But thanks to her selflessness,
many orphans were saved. As if
to show their gratitude for all
she had done, they grew into
fine adults.
records.target_korean:
고향으로 돌아온 리아나는
전쟁으로 부모를 잃은 아이들을
위해 고아원을 세웠다. 하지만 이익이 없는 사업에 돈을
낼 사람은 당시에는 아무도 없었다. 고민하던 리아나에게 어느 날
이웃 나라 성의 사자가 찾아왔다. 미모의 소문을 들은 왕이 아들과
결혼하면 고아원에 돈을 대겠다고 했다. 리아나는 무척 고민했지만 다른 방법이
없어 결국 제안을 받아들일 수밖에 없었다. 그 희생으로 많은 고아가 구원받아
은혜에 보답하듯 훌륭한 어른으로 자랐다.

records.english_reference:
Returning to her home village,
started an orphanage for
those who had lost their parents
during the war.
This orphanage, which she had
started as a charity enterprise,
fell into financial trouble, and
operating it became difficult.
But a wealthy aristocrat, who
had taken a liking to some
time ago, started financing it.
And thus the orphanage developed
into a learning center;
was able to save and teach many
war orphans.
It is said that finally
accepted the many passionate
proposals of the man. They were
married and lived in happiness.
records.target_korean:
고향으로 돌아온 리아나는
전쟁으로 부모를 잃은 아이들을
위해 고아원을 세웠다. 자선으로 시작한 고아원은 자금난에

전쟁고아를 구하고 가르칠 수 있었다. 리아나는 그 남자의 진심 어린
청혼을 마침내 받아들여 결혼했고
행복하게 살았다고 한다.

records.english_reference:
Returning to her home village,
started an orphanage for
those who had lost their parents
during the war.
This orphanage, which she had
started as a charity enterprise,
fell into financial trouble, and
operating it became difficult.
Before long, the many people who

Because of this, the war orphans
grew up in good health and began

from suffering the same fate as

She came to be revered by future
generations as a holy woman.
records.target_korean:
고향으로 돌아온 리아나는
전쟁으로 부모를 잃은 아이들을
위해 고아원을 세웠다. 자선으로 시작한 고아원은 자금난에
빠져 운영하기 어려워졌다. 리아나의 인품을 믿은 수많은 사람이
후원해 고아원은 교육 기관으로 발전했다. 그 덕분에 고아들은 건강하게
자라 같은 처지의 아이를
없애려는 운동을 시작했다. 리아나는 후세에 성녀로
추앙받게 됐다.

records.english_reference:
Returning to her home village,
started an orphanage for
those who had lost their parents
during the war.
However, there was no one at
that time who would finance
such an unprofitable enterprise.
But could not stand by and
watch as the war orphans died of
starvation.
Undertaking physical labor, she
chose to do arduous jobs and
somehow managed to scrape the
money together.
But , suffering from
starvation and having put
too much strain on her body,
eventually collapsed.
Unable to realize her dream,
she breathed her last breath.
records.target_korean:
고향으로 돌아온 리아나는
전쟁으로 부모를 잃은 아이들을
